decision_summary: v6.7.0 release surfaces and governance gates are aligned for release closure
rationale: Package, bootstrap, active release manifest, organization release contract, README, quickstart, release docs, release-state-audit, command routing, CLI help benchmark, focused runtime tests, full tests, and smoke validation have been run or prepared for v6.7.0 closure.
recommendation: Close TASK-076, commit v6.7.0 release closure, then tag and publish v6.7.0 after final verification.
expected_user_reaction: v6.7 release readiness is backed by runtime gates rather than artifact count
